reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces a comprehensive update to the drum chart layout, focusing on print and PDF optimization as defined in the new `PRINT_PDF_LIVE_SPEC.md`. Key changes include a refactored `SongChartHeader` with improved metadata display, a new grid wrapping mechanism in `GrooveGridEditor` that limits rows to two measures, and enhanced CSS for high-contrast printing. Feedback focuses on maintaining visual alignment between the instrument info panels and the new dynamic note cell sizes, ensuring border colors strictly adhere to the high-contrast specification, and improving the robustness of ID generation for new instruments.

## Pull request overview

Implements the print/PDF/live formatting spec for song charts (indentation hierarchy, high-contrast output), and refactors groove grids to wrap measures into fixed-size rows for consistent layout.

**Changes:**
- Added `docs/PRINT_PDF_LIVE_SPEC.md` as the layout source-of-truth.
- Updated chart rendering (section/subsection indentation + auto-generated “Order” metadata).
- Refactored `GrooveGridEditor` to wrap measures into rows of 2 and made note cell sizing variable-driven; updated related unit tests.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 10 out of 11 changed files in this pull request and generated 4 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md | Records the recent production deployment milestone. |
| docs/PRINT_PDF_LIVE_SPEC.md | Adds the formal spec for print/PDF/live chart layout. |
| components/groove/NoteCell.tsx | Moves cell sizing to a CSS variable and scales icons proportionally. |
| components/groove/InstrumentRow.tsx | Supports rendering a slice of notes to enable measure-wrapping. |
| components/groove/GrooveGridEditor.tsx | Implements “2 measures per row” wrapping and block-based labels/rows. |
| components/groove/__tests__/InstrumentRow.test.tsx | Updates tests to pass the new slicing props. |
| components/chart/SongSectionView.tsx | Applies indentation levels and print page-break prevention classes. |
| components/chart/SongChartView.tsx | Passes sections into the header to support auto “Order” generation. |
| components/chart/SongChartHeader.tsx | Renders high-contrast header metadata incl. auto “Order” list. |
| app/print.css | Enforces black-on-white print output and adds print layout overrides. |
</details>

## Code Review

This pull request implements a comprehensive update to the drum chart layout, specifically optimizing for print and PDF output. Key changes include a new CSS print stylesheet for high contrast, a redesigned song header with section order tracking, and a refactored groove grid that now supports multi-row wrapping (2 measures per row). Feedback focuses on improving the flexibility of hardcoded layout constants and ensuring the reliability of unique ID generation in non-secure contexts.

## Pull request overview

Copilot reviewed 10 out of 13 changed files in this pull request and generated 5 comments.

## Code Review

This pull request implements a comprehensive layout refactor for drum charts, optimized for print and performance as detailed in the new `PRINT_PDF_LIVE_SPEC.md`. Key enhancements include the introduction of grid wrapping logic in `GrooveGridEditor` to limit measures per row, hierarchical indentation for song sections, and a robust state synchronization mechanism in `GrooveGridContext` to prevent infinite loops during external updates. Additionally, `NoteCell` was updated for better accessibility, and E2E tests were adjusted to handle the multi-row instrument structure. Feedback identifies a potential division-by-zero error in the grid wrapping calculation and requests justification for skipping a critical visual regression test.
